condition_cn: 条件：90分钟常规时间打平；输入包括完整90分钟预测、平局比分分布、淘汰赛证据、常规时间Tail与MAS结论。

points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段时间短且淘汰赛风险偏好下降，仍平是基础高概率分支。
points.rationale_en: Because extra time is short and knockout risk appetite falls, remaining level is the high-probability baseline branch.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
points.rationale_cn: Belgium凭借体能、替补或压迫优势在加时净胜一球。
points.rationale_en: Belgium wins extra time by one goal through fitness, bench impact or pressing advantage.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
points.rationale_cn: Senegal凭借体能、替补或反击效率在加时净胜一球。
points.rationale_en: Senegal wins extra time by one goal through fitness, bench impact or counterattacking efficiency.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段比赛打开，双方各有一次有效转化。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score
points.rationale_en: Extra time opens up and both teams convert one meaningful chance.

points.tail_title_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: Belgium在对手体能或心理崩盘后拉开比分。
points.rationale_en: Belgium pulls away after the opponent shows a physical or psychological drop-off.

points.tail_title_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: Senegal在对手压上后连续制造转换机会。
points.rationale_en: Senegal creates repeated transition chances after the opponent pushes forward.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球，体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score, Fatigue collapse / extra-time breakthrough
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球，体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score, Fatigue collapse / extra-time breakthrough
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

points.rationale_cn: 加时阶段体能崩溃或开放对攻形成的低频高偏离路径。
points.rationale_en: A low-frequency tail path where fatigue or open extra-time play creates a wider scoring swing.

points.tail_title_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
points.rationale_cn: 双方加时互有进球但仍未分胜负的补充覆盖路径。
points.tail_title_en: Open extra time / both teams score
points.rationale_en: A supplementary extra-time path where both teams score but the match remains level.

points.rationale_cn: 由统一淘汰赛路径分布派生。
points.rationale_en: Derived from the unified knockout path distribution.

points.rationale_cn: 由统一淘汰赛路径分布派生。
points.rationale_en: Derived from the unified knockout path distribution.

points.rationale_cn: 由统一淘汰赛路径分布派生。
points.rationale_en: Derived from the unified knockout path distribution.

tail_focus.label: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
tail_focus.label_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时30分钟内通过反击、定位球或替补冲击形成1球胜负。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: Belgium凭借体能、替补或压迫优势在加时净胜一球。
tail_focus.definition_en: A one-goal extra-time result is produced through a counterattack, set piece or substitute impact.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Belgium wins extra time by one goal through fitness, bench impact or pressing advantage.

tail_focus.label: 加时开放 / 双方进球
tail_focus.label_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时阶段双方均有进球，比赛从谨慎拖入开放对攻。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: 加时阶段比赛打开，双方各有一次有效转化。
tail_focus.label_en: Open extra time / both teams score
tail_focus.definition_en: Both teams score in extra time as the match shifts from caution into open exchanges.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Extra time opens up and both teams convert one meaningful chance.

tail_focus.label: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
tail_focus.label_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时净胜至少2球，或总进球达到3球以上的一方打穿路径。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: Belgium在对手体能或心理崩盘后拉开比分。
tail_focus.definition_en: A team wins extra time by at least two goals, or the extra-time segment reaches three or more total goals.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Belgium pulls away after the opponent shows a physical or psychological drop-off.

key_factors.label_cn: Mendy伤缺放大比利时后段优势
key_factors.impact_cn: 塞内加尔一门Mendy因膝伤缺席，使比利时在加时的传中、定位球、二点球和门将处理高球环节更值得关注。
key_factors.label_en: Mendy's absence raises Belgium's late and extra-time edge
key_factors.impact_en: Senegal's first-choice goalkeeper Mendy is out with a knee injury, making Belgium's crosses, set pieces, second balls and aerial-goalkeeping pressure more relevant in extra time.
key_factors.text_cn: 塞内加尔一门Mendy因膝伤缺席，使比利时在加时的传中、定位球、二点球和门将处理高球环节更值得关注。
key_factors.text_en: Senegal's first-choice goalkeeper Mendy is out with a knee injury, making Belgium's crosses, set pieces, second balls and aerial-goalkeeping pressure more relevant in extra time.

key_factors.label_cn: 比利时前场组织持续施压
key_factors.impact_cn: De Bruyne、Doku、Trossard、Lukaku等关键资源让比利时在加时仍可能保持组织和替补冲击。
key_factors.label_en: Belgium's attacking structure can keep wearing down Senegal
key_factors.impact_en: De Bruyne, Doku, Trossard, Lukaku and related attacking resources allow Belgium to keep organization and bench impact alive in extra time.
key_factors.text_cn: De Bruyne、Doku、Trossard、Lukaku等关键资源让比利时在加时仍可能保持组织和替补冲击。
key_factors.text_en: De Bruyne, Doku, Trossard, Lukaku and related attacking resources allow Belgium to keep organization and bench impact alive in extra time.

key_factors.label_cn: 塞内加尔转换与身体对抗
key_factors.impact_cn: 塞内加尔有身体对抗、转换和5-0战胜伊拉克的爆发样本，若比利时压上失衡，仍有偷袭窗口。
key_factors.label_en: Senegal's transition and physicality remain the counter-branch
key_factors.impact_en: Senegal retains physicality, transitions and the 5-0 Iraq sample as a counter-branch; if Belgium overcommits, an extra-time steal remains possible.
key_factors.text_cn: 塞内加尔有身体对抗、转换和5-0战胜伊拉克的爆发样本，若比利时压上失衡，仍有偷袭窗口。
key_factors.text_en: Senegal retains physicality, transitions and the 5-0 Iraq sample as a counter-branch; if Belgium overcommits, an extra-time steal remains possible.

key_factors.impact_cn: 进入加时后，边路反复冲刺价值下降，定位球、二点球和禁区纪律更可能决定是否被打穿。
key_factors.label_en: Belgium pressure can turn Senegal's low block into a discipline test
key_factors.impact_en: In extra time, repeated wide sprints matter less; set pieces, second balls and box discipline are more likely to decide whether the block breaks.
key_factors.text_cn: 进入加时后，边路反复冲刺价值下降，定位球、二点球和禁区纪律更可能决定是否被打穿。
key_factors.text_en: In extra time, repeated wide sprints matter less; set pieces, second balls and box discipline are more likely to decide whether the block breaks.

key_factors.impact_cn: 105分钟仍平时，塞内加尔若判断点球门将端不利，可能提高反击投入；比利时压上也会增加身后风险。
key_factors.label_en: After 105 minutes, both teams face a penalty-path tradeoff
key_factors.impact_en: If still level after 105 minutes, Senegal may attack more if it judges the goalkeeper side of penalties unfavorable; Belgium's pressure also increases space behind.
key_factors.text_cn: 105分钟仍平时，塞内加尔若判断点球门将端不利，可能提高反击投入；比利时压上也会增加身后风险。
key_factors.text_en: If still level after 105 minutes, Senegal may attack more if it judges the goalkeeper side of penalties unfavorable; Belgium's pressure also increases space behind.

condition_en: Condition: the match is level after 90 minutes; inputs include the full 90-minute prediction, draw score distribution, knockout evidence, normal-time tail scenarios and MAS conclusions.
